name: parser-roundtrip-gate
title: Parser and Round-trip Gate
summary: Parse, serialize and reparse representative source artifacts without losing semantics, identifiers, comments required for review, or platform metadata.

name: semantic-preservation-gate
title: Semantic Preservation Gate
summary: Prove source-to-target behavior for business rules, state machines, error paths, side effects and external contracts.

name: numeric-datetime-collation-gate
title: Numeric, Date-Time and Collation Gate
summary: Detect precision, rounding, overflow, missing/null, timezone, locale, encoding and collation drift.

name: transaction-state-gate
title: Transaction and State Consistency Gate
summary: Validate commit, rollback, locking, replay, state recovery and consistency boundaries across platforms.

name: concurrency-restart-gate
title: Concurrency and Restart Gate
summary: Exercise task/process/thread/actor scheduling, restart, cancellation, duplicate delivery and backpressure.

name: identity-authorization-gate
title: Identity and Authorization Gate
summary: Enforce platform-native identities, least privilege, tenant/resource scope and negative authorization.

name: unsafe-interop-sandbox-gate
title: Unsafe Interop and Sandbox Gate
summary: Test native calls, FFI, COM, dynamic SQL, macro/runtime reflection and embedded scripting isolation.

name: toolchain-provenance-license-gate
title: Toolchain Provenance and License Gate
summary: Validate compilers, vendor tools, packages, images, plugins, licenses, signatures and reproducible acquisition.

name: binary-runtime-compatibility-gate
title: Binary and Runtime Compatibility Gate
summary: Check ABI, package, runtime, VM, firmware, schema and supported-version compatibility.

name: source-target-differential-gate
title: Source-Target Differential Gate
summary: Run source and target against golden and generated cases, reconcile outputs and classify every difference.

name: generation-idempotency-gate
title: Generation Idempotency Gate
summary: Repeat generation with identical inputs and require no semantic diff or unstable identifiers.

name: manual-edit-preservation-gate
title: Manual Edit Preservation Gate
summary: Regenerate after protected and user-owned changes; prohibit overwrite or silent semantic loss.

name: large-estate-performance-gate
title: Large Estate Performance Gate
summary: Test large repositories, models, schemas and dependency graphs under declared latency, memory, token and cost limits.

name: failure-recovery-gate
title: Failure Recovery Gate
summary: Interrupt tools, vendor runtimes, networks, storage and agents; resume without duplication or evidence loss.

name: evidence-integrity-gate
title: Evidence Integrity Gate
summary: Detect missing, selectively omitted, reordered or tampered build, simulation, migration and approval evidence.

name: version-drift-gate
title: Version Drift Gate
summary: Change compiler, runtime, package, schema, vendor platform and operating environment versions; require explicit compatibility decisions.

name: platform-deployment-gate
title: Platform Deployment Gate
summary: Validate packaging, configuration, health, rollout, operational telemetry and platform-specific deployment behavior.

name: cutover-rollback-gate
title: Cutover and Rollback Gate
summary: Test parallel run, canary/cutover, forward recovery, rollback boundaries and decommission safeguards.

name: safety-regulatory-boundary-gate
title: Safety and Regulatory Boundary Gate
summary: Block unsupported safety, clinical, financial, privacy or regulated claims without independent approval.

name: cross-language-interop-gate
title: Cross-Language Interoperability Gate
summary: Validate generated Java/.NET/Python/Swift and platform adapters against canonical data and contract semantics.

name: data-migration-lineage-gate
title: Data Migration and Lineage Gate
summary: Verify complete, reversible where possible, reconciled and lineage-preserving data movement.

name: test-anti-cheating-gate
title: Test Anti-Cheating Gate
summary: Detect deleted tests, weakened assertions, mocked mandatory integrations, hidden skips and manipulated tolerances.

name: source-skill-coverage-gate
title: Source Skill Coverage Gate
summary: Require direct test mapping and executed evidence for all PG223–PG402 source Skills.

name: product-handoff-gate
title: ELMOS Product Handoff Gate
summary: Verify Batch 81–95 outputs can enter Project Synthesis, Modernization, Build, Evidence and Requirement Studio workflows.

name: final-release-certification
title: Batch 81–95 Final Release Certification
summary: Apply non-compensating release criteria across all batch and cross-platform gates.
